claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A React Aria anchored menu with shared-layer registration, typeahead, focus return, and an optional explicit destructive confirmation step.
semantics: React Aria owns portal positioning, collision, collection typeahead, dismissal, and focus return; Mergora LayerManager records the active layer without adding a second Escape handler.
The nearest MergoraProvider locale is passed to React Aria I18nProvider for locale-correct collection matching and typeahead.
Direction remains independent from locale: public start/end maps to physical left/right placement before crossing the React Aria portal.
Consumer item ids are validated as non-empty and unique collection keys; description IDREFs use generated index-based DOM ids rather than raw keys.
Destructive actions require a second activation with explicit confirmation text by default; confirmDestructiveActions=false removes that enhancement completely.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve boundaries, state, and focus.
preferences.reducedMotion: Feedback remains understandable when transitions and rotation are removed.
preferences.rtl: Logical properties and the documented spatial keyboard model follow direction.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Wrap, reflow, or expose native scrolling without clipping controls or focus indicators.
